productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Dumont Beige Sports Shoes
description: Make your runs easier and lighter with these Dumont trainers from adidas. With its lightweight features, your walks are guaranteed to be fast and comfortable. Upper Mesh uppers with overlays for lightweight durability and breathability Cushioned tongue and collar for extra comfort Mesh tongue for greater breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Three synthetic overlays across the sides signifying brand motto of performance, perseverance and achievement, and the patented adidas 3-Stripe Outsole extended onto the toe box and embedded onto it for better protection of the forefoot Brand name embroidered on the tongue and behind collar Pull loop for ease of wearing Midsole Cushioned footbed for all day step-in comfort LiteStrike technology on the mid heel for better cushioning of the heel Full length phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning Outsole Rubber outsole for lightweight motion control Outsole with lugs on the forefoot for better grip and traction Flex grooves for better flexibility of the feet shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
